text: Catching up here — I keep seeing MR-42 in older design docs. Is that a separate workstream from Atlas?
Same thing — MR-42 was the internal code name before the program was renamed. Atlas is the only name now, per <@U001>'s kickoff note.
Got it. I'll have the old docs retitled so nobody else trips on it.
Staffing reminder: the two engineers borrowed from Beacon go back at the end of May. Plan the Atlas sprint boundaries around that.
